description: Redis Sorted Set (ZSET) operations for leaderboards and ranking

examples.description: Add members with scores to a sorted set
examples.command: ZADD leaderboard 1500 alice 1200 bob 1800 carol 900 dave
examples.explanation: Adds four players with scores to the leaderboard sorted set.

examples.description: Get top N members by score
examples.command: ZRANGE leaderboard 0 -1 BYSCORE REV WITHSCORES LIMIT 0 3
examples.explanation: Get top 3 members in descending score order.

examples.description: Get the rank of a member (0-indexed, ascending)
